description: You are an interior designer preparing a dining scene visualization. The scene has a table but needs a tablecloth that drapes naturally over it. Starting from the loaded table scene, create a tablecloth using a subdivided plane (minimum 10x10 subdivisions, approximately 4x3 meters) positioned above the table (Z >= 1.5). Configure the plane with cloth physics and the 'TableTop' and 'Ground' objects with collision physics. Run the simulation for 60 frames to allow the fabric to drape and settle. Save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/cloth_drape.blend and export a render of the settled cloth (frame 50-60) to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/cloth_render.png.
